headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Equal-Weight on Hasbro, Lowers Price Target to $92
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Anthony Bonadio   maintains Hasbro (NASDAQ:HAS) with a Equal-Weight and lowers the price target from $98 to $92.

headline: Stocks Slip Before the Open as Oil Rises on U.S.-Iran Peace Deal Uncertainty, PMI Data in Focus
summary: June S&P 500 E-Mini futures (ESM26) are down -0.40%, and June Nasdaq 100 E-Mini futures (NQM26) are down -0.55% this morning as oil prices and bond yields climbed, with investors watching to see whether hopes for a peace deal in the Middle East will turn into tangible progress.

headline: B of A Securities Maintains Buy on Hasbro, Raises Price Target to $115
summary: B of A Securities  analyst Alexander Perry   maintains Hasbro (NASDAQ:HAS) with a Buy and raises the price target from $113 to $115.

raw.headline: B of A Securities Maintains Buy on Hasbro, Raises Price Target to $115

headline: Nvidia Delivers Again But the Market Has Already Moved On
summary: Wednesday's session didn't need Nvidia's numbers to go green. The chip sector had already decided to buy the rumor. When the actual results arrived after the close, they were staggering. And the stock fell.
